title: Relocating a Commercial Print Shop: Specialized Flatbed Transport for Oversized Industrial Printers
excerpt: Commercial print shop relocation: flatbed transport oversized industrial printers, wide-format presses, commercial moving rigging Addis Ababa print industry.
content:
Relocating a commercial print shop: specialized flatbed transport for oversized industrial printers

Commercial print shops center on machines longer than truck door is wide—wide-format inkjet, offset towers, cutters weighing tons. Relocation requires flatbed transport, rigging, OEM technician prep, and level install at destination—not inclined dolly and optimism.

This guide covers print shop moves with specialized flatbed transport for industrial printers.

Machine survey and prep

  • OEM or certified tech drain fluids, secure heads, lock transport bars.
  • Weight and center of gravity documented for rigging plan.
  • Path measure: door, elevator, ramp—crane contingency if fail.
  • Consumables and inks hazmat pack separate regulation.

Flatbed and rigging

Low-loader flatbed for oversize; strap rated; blanket under contact. Forklift or crane load at shop with exclusion zone. Tie-down recheck every rough road segment Addis standard.

Ancillary equipment

Laminators, cutters, binding lines—each disassembly photo sequence. Paper stock palletized shrink-wrapped. Computers and RIP servers IT tier hand-carry.

Destination install

Level floor verified; power three-phase confirm electrician before plug. Calibration post-move before client jobs resume—budget downtime honest.

Insurance

Declared machine value; condition report signed tech at both ends.

Active Movers print shop tier

Rigging and flatbed quoted post-survey with machine model list—technician coordination client arranges OEM slot parallel.

Conclusion

Print shop relocations demand OEM prep, flatbed oversize transport, rigging discipline, and leveled recommission—industrial printers survive when treated as factory assets not office furniture.
author: Active Movers Team
